title: epilobium pubens var. minor
intro: Epilobium pubens var. minor, also known as the dwarf willowherb or small-fruited willowherb, is a plant species that belongs to the willowherb family (Onagraceae). It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Epilobium pubens var. minor include its potential to support urinary tract health, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant in the body. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
